note: Labeled paraphrase set for Phase 2 M1/M2 (DEP4). Claude-generated — HUMAN-VERIFY before trusting the numbers. Each `positives[].paraphrases` is a reworded scenario that means the SAME as `intent` (should be reuse/extend); `negatives` are genuinely new scenarios outside the curated flows (should be new). Paraphrases deliberately share few words with the intent so they test SEMANTIC over lexical.

positives.intent: Load home page. Verify the hero landing content and primary navigation render.
paraphrases: Confirm the front page opens with its banner and top menu visible
Check the site's main entry screen displays its masthead

positives.intent: Use primary navigation menu. Verify top-level menu items are present and clickable.
paraphrases: Click through the header links and confirm each is reachable
Exercise the main menu bar at the top of the site

positives.intent: View services / what-we-do section. Verify the services listing renders.
paraphrases: Open the offerings area and confirm the capabilities list shows
Look at what the company provides under its solutions page

positives.intent: View industries section. Verify industry content renders.
paraphrases: Check the sectors the firm serves are listed
Open the verticals page and confirm its content loads

positives.intent: Browse case studies / work. Verify the case study entries render.
paraphrases: Look through the portfolio of client success stories
Open the showcase of completed projects

positives.intent: Browse insights / blog. Verify the article listing renders.
paraphrases: Read the latest posts in the news and thought-leadership area
Open the articles feed and confirm entries appear

positives.intent: View About / Company page. Verify the company information renders.
paraphrases: Open the who-we-are page and confirm the firm's story shows
Check the organisation background section loads

positives.intent: View careers page. Verify job opportunities render.
paraphrases: Open the jobs and vacancies listing
Check the work-with-us hiring page displays roles

positives.intent: Open contact page and form. Verify the enquiry form renders and submits.
paraphrases: Send a message through the get-in-touch enquiry widget
Fill in the reach-us form and submit it

positives.intent: Use footer navigation links. Verify the bottom-of-page links work.
paraphrases: Click the links in the page's bottom bar
Exercise the navigation at the very foot of the site

negatives: Add a product to the shopping cart and check out
Reset a forgotten account password via email
Filter the catalogue results by price range
Play the embedded demo video and pause it
Switch the interface language to French
Apply a discount coupon at checkout
Upload a profile photo to the account settings
